CustomField.label: Monthly Accrual (Days)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days accrued per month. Example: 1.25 days/month for EL (15 days/year). Leave blank or 0 for full lump-sum credit at year start (e.g., CL, SL).
CustomField.description: Null/0 = full entitlement credited at start of year. >0 = accrues monthly via batch.
